zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Swinnerton於大約1250年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯恩頓時，他的父親Stephen Swynnerton22歲，母親Joan Ware12歲。他與Matilda Holland結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1381年12月在法國享年132歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Swinnerton于大约1250年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯恩頓时，他的父亲Stephen Swynnerton22岁，母亲Joan Ware12岁。他与Matilda Holland结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1381年12月在法国享年132岁。

nameMeanings.name: Swinnerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Swynnerton in Staffordshire. The etymology of the placename is uncertain. It may derive from Old English swille ‘sloppy mess, swill’ + ford ‘ford’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Alternatively, the first element may be swīn ‘swine, hog’, swān ‘herdsman, peasant’, swan ‘swan’, or sumor ‘summer’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Swinnerton was born about 1250, in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Stephen Swynnerton, was 22 and his mother, Joan Ware, was 12. He married Matilda Holland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in December 1381, in France, at the age of 132.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Swinnerton est né environ 1250, à Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Stephen Swynnerton, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Joan Ware, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Matilda Holland. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en décembre 1381, à France, à l’âge de 132 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Swinnerton um 1250 in Swynnerton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Stephen Swynnerton 22 und seine Mutter Joan Ware 12. Er hat Matilda Holland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Dezember 1381 im Alter von 132 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Swinnerton è nato il circa 1250 nel Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Stephen Swynnerton, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Joan Ware, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Matilda Holland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel dicembre 1381, nel Francia, all'età di 132 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Swinnertonが約1250年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスウイネルトンで生まれた時，父Stephen Swynnertonは22歳，母Joan Wareは12歳であった。Matilda Hollandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1381年12月にフランスで132歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Swinnerton(이)가 대략 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스윈르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen Swynnerton(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Ware(은)는 12세였다. 그는 Matilda Holland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1381년 12월 프랑스에서 132세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Swinnerton nasceu aproximadamente 1250, em Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Stephen Swynnerton, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Joan Ware, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda Holland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1381, em França, com 132 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Swinnerton родился около 1250 г. в местности свинниртон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Stephen Swynnerton было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Ware, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Holland. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер декабрь 1381 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 132 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Swinnerton nació aproximadamente 1250, en Swynnerton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Stephen Swynnerton, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Joan Ware, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Matilda Holland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en diciembre de 1381, en Francia, a la edad de 132 años.
